venue: The Pelligon, 43 Bank Street, Canary Wharf, London

schedule.title: Registration and light breakfast
schedule.note: Walk-in music low. House lights up. Comms check complete by 08:30.

schedule.title: Fireside discussion: In Conversation With…
schedule.desc: Major macroeconomic, geopolitical and investment themes reshaping the global financial landscape.

schedule.title: Panel: Managing the Explosive Growth in Alternatives

people.name: Robert Cagnati
people.role: Chief Risk Officer & Head of Portfolio Solutions

schedule.desc: Alternatives now sit at $22tn AUM (15% of global). Will the trend continue and where will the next wave of capital come from?

schedule.title: From Policy Shifts to Trade Wars — The Political Forces Reshaping the Global Markets

people.name: Alastair Campbell
people.role: Broadcaster & former Spokesperson for PM Tony Blair

schedule.desc: Keynote on the impact of policy shifts, regulatory change and trade wars on the global economy.

schedule.title: Panel: What is the Future of Sustainable Investing in a Divided World?
schedule.desc: Sustainable & ESG assets predicted to reach $35–50tn by 2030. What are the threats and opportunities ahead?

schedule.title: Maximising Performance — The Intersection of Sport and Business

people.name: Sir Chris Hoy MBE
people.role: Multiple World & Olympic Champion Track Cyclist

schedule.desc: Lessons from elite sport on spotting opportunities, mitigating risk and performing under pressure.

schedule.title: Fireside discussion: Lessons in Leadership

people.name: Lord David Cameron
people.role: Former UK Prime Minister (2010–2016); Foreign Secretary (2023–2024)

schedule.desc: Lessons in leadership and actionable strategies for navigating uncertainty and disruption.
